User.title: User Profile
User.description: User specific security permissions, chat logs, voice interaction packets, and current GPS telemetry

permissions.description: List of Aegis device and integration access privileges

voiceInteractions.description: Telemetric trace of standard vocal packet triggers and responses

chatHistory.description: Historical linear dialogue logs in text layout form

email.description: User email address if authenticated via OAuth

users/{userId}.description: Collection storing localized user policies, preferences, and session data
